## Requirement

A third active FR with a pre-existing tracker binding so a downstream
`<tracker> → <other>` regression proves the alphabetical-merge rule
(AC-58.2) on real fixture shape, not just unit-test shape.

## Acceptance Criteria

- AC-3.1: `src/util.ts` exports `whisper(name: string): string`
- AC-3.2: `whisper("world")` returns `"hello, world"` in lowercase

## Notes

Fixture data for FR-57 iteration coverage + FR-58 alphabetical-merge
regression surface.
